data.title: Trump Administration Veteran Dina Powell, Stripe CEO Join Meta As Mark Zuckerberg Reshapes Company
data.description: Meta has added Trump-era official Dina Powell McCormick and Stripe CEO Patrick Collison to its board, signaling a strategic and political shift as CEO Mark Zuckerberg reshapes the company's leadership amid regulatory scrutiny and internal policy overhauls.

data.title: Star Trek-Quoting Judge Boasberg, Once Targeted By Trump, Could Decide If Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Gets To Keep Instagram
data.description: U.S. District Judge James Boasberg, known for high-profile rulings involving Trump, cultural references like Star Trek, and a history of overseeing politically charged cases, will now preside over the landmark FTC antitrust trial that could break up Meta's $1.37 trillion empire.

data.title: Trump Tariffs Have Put 'America Last' For Investors, Peter Schiff Warns Of A Financial Crisis Worse Than 2008
data.description: Peter Schiff argues that Donald Trump's America first goal has pushed U.S. investments to the back of the pack, as foreign inflows slow and the dollar weakens.

data.title: OM Token's 90% Crash Leaves Holders Reeling —MANTRA Blames 'Reckless Liquidations,' CEO Says 'Fixing This'
data.description: The native cryptocurrency of a real-world asset-focused project dramatically crashed by nearly 90% on Sunday, wiping out billions of dollars worth of investors' fortunes.

data.title: Trump Praises Nayib Bukele For Taking In 'Violent Alien Enemies' Ahead Of Monday Meet Even As US Deports 10 More To El Salvador
data.description: President Donald Trump commended El Salvador’s President Nayib Bukele for accepting custody of dangerous criminals, emphasizing the nations’ joint efforts against terrorism ahead of their meeting at the White House on Monday.
